title: WebGPU Spec Finalized (W3C)
desc: GPU computing in browsers is now a W3C standard. Chrome/Safari shipping, Firefox nightly.

title: WebNN API for Edge AI
desc: Run neural networks client-side. W3C spec, Chrome origin trial active.

title: Progressive Web Apps (MDN)
desc: Native-like web apps: installable, offline, push notifications. Full docs on MDN.

title: CSS Nesting Support
desc: Native CSS nesting now in all major browsers. No preprocessor needed.

title: View Transitions API
desc: Smooth page navigation animations. Chrome 111+, Firefox/Safari experimental.
